title: Outage on PE-Router PE-69 (IP/MPLS, Western)
description: A IP/MPLS outage was observed on PE-Router PE-69 in the Western region. Operations reported complete service loss with all monitored interfaces unreachable. Key indicators included BFD behaviour and MPLS label anomalies. The condition persisted across two polling cycles before triage began.
resolution_steps: Roll back the most recent change, re-validate the parameter set in the lab profile, then re-apply with peer review.
lessons_learned: Cross-link this record to the affected SOP to shorten retrieval during similar incidents.

title: Polling Failure on MSC M-34 (Core Network, Western)
description: A Core Network polling failure was observed on MSC M-34 in the Western region. Operations reported intermittent telemetry loss and repeated timeout alarms in the NMS. Key indicators included diameter session behaviour and attach procedure anomalies. The condition persisted across two polling cycles before triage began.
resolution_steps: Shed non-critical load, re-balance traffic, and submit a capacity expansion request through change.
lessons_learned: Record vendor case number in the closure form so future searches resolve faster.

title: SOP: handling performance issue in Power Systems
description: Standard operating procedure for diagnosing and resolving performance issue events in the Power Systems domain. Covers triage, escalation, and closure steps.
resolution_steps: Step 1: confirm alarm scope. Step 2: classify by technology and severity. Step 3: apply the DC bus check. Step 4: escalate per matrix if unresolved in 10 minutes.
lessons_learned: Refer to the SOP first before opening a new incident closure record.

title: Vendor note: power issue workaround for Access Network
description: Vendor-published workaround for power issue affecting Access Network elements. Applicable to firmware ranges shipped between 2024 and 2026.
resolution_steps: Apply the vendor-supplied RF carrier workaround and schedule the fixed release.
lessons_learned: Cross-link this note to incident closures that reference the same firmware family.

title: Lessons learned: polling failure in Power Systems (Southern)
description: Retrospective summary of recent polling failure events in the Power Systems domain. Captures recurring failure patterns and the procedural changes adopted after closure review.
resolution_steps: See linked incident closures for resolution steps; this record captures the retrospective.
lessons_learned: Validate configuration changes in a test profile before production deployment.
